name: sdd
description: Spec-Driven Development for Claude Code: 15 atomic, stack-agnostic skills that carry a feature from idea → spec → design → data-model → API → tasks → tests → implement → review → ship, plus a TDD implementation engine and 6 subagents. Start with `survey` (it maps an existing codebase or bootstraps an empty one), then walk the gated backbone — each stage reads the previous artifact and hard-refuses if it's missing; heavy detail lives in each skill's references/, shared logic once in skills/_shared/.
